_help: One schedule of co-located jobs sharing a server's embodied carbon. Each job has `cpu` (cores), `runtime` (how many time-slots it runs), and `start` (which slot it starts). The cluster is built for the PEAK of concurrent demand. Edit the schedule and re-run: ./tutorial.sh --workloads exercises/workloads.json . Watch RUP (bills by cpu x runtime), Shapley (fair, bills by who drives the peak), and Fair-CO2 (cheap approximation of Shapley). Shared budget defaults to ACT's R740 (1523.1 kg); override with --budget <kg>.
